summary: Full backend and frontend testing of Aria AI assistant app. Fixed a critical MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in task creation. All major features are working. 9/10 backend tests pass, all core frontend screens functional.

critical.issue: 500 error due to MongoDB ObjectId not being removed from response after insert_one(). Fixed by adding doc.pop('_id', None) before return.

minor.issue: No health endpoint defined in server.py - returns 404. Not a feature requirement but good practice.

react_native_issues.issue: expo-av is deprecated (SDK 54). Warning: '[expo-av]: Expo AV has been deprecated and will be removed in SDK 54. Use the expo-audio and expo-video packages'. expo-audio and expo-linear-gradient and expo-notifications version mismatch per package.json vs expected SDK versions.

action_items: Add GET /api/health endpoint for health checks
Update expo-audio, expo-linear-gradient, expo-notifications to SDK 54 compatible versions (expo-audio: ~1.1.1, expo-linear-gradient: ~15.0.8, expo-notifications: ~0.32.16)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 465: insert_one() mutates the doc dict by adding _id ObjectId. Always pop _id after insert_one before returning. FIXED.
expo-av deprecation: The app uses expo-av for audio which is deprecated in SDK 54 and will be removed. Should migrate to expo-audio package.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (added doc.pop('_id', None) after insert_one in create_task)

success_rate.backend: 90% (9/10 - only /api/health missing which is not a required feature)
success_rate.frontend: 95% (all screens load, all tab navigation works, chat AI responds, task creation works, entertainment and travel screens functional)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Test data created: TEST_task via API, TEST_task_pytest via pytest (auto-cleanup not done).
context_for_next_testing_agent: One critical bug was fixed (MongoDB ObjectId in task creation). All 5 tabs working. AI chat functional (confirmed via API test with Claude Sonnet 4.5). Weather shows real Mumbai data from Open-Meteo. News from RSS (Times of India live data). Entertainment and Travel use MOCKED seed data. expo-av deprecation warning present.
rca_of_issue: POST /api/tasks returned 500 because motor's insert_one() mutates the input dict by adding the '_id' MongoDB ObjectId field. FastAPI's jsonable_encoder cannot serialize bson.ObjectId, causing ValueError. Fix: call doc.pop('_id', None) after insert_one() before returning the dict.
